modal.welcome.title: Navigator
modal.welcome.introOne: A map for everyone, right in the browser.
modal.welcome.introTwo: No app stores, no accounts, no tracking. Powered by Open-Source.
modal.welcome.locateInfo: Display your current location by pressing Locate. Your permission is required, but no location data ever leaves your device.
panel.about.title: About Navigator
panel.about.descriptionOne: A map for everyone, right in the browser.
panel.about.descriptionTwo: Navigator aims to be a general purpose mapping tool that anyone can use, built with Open-Source software and Open data.
panel.about.descriptionThree: The app is free to use, does not require any registration, and does not collect any personal data.
panel.privacy.title: Your Privacy
panel.privacy.onDeviceBody: Your map view and settings are stored in your browser's local storage only — this data never leaves your device.
panel.privacy.mapView: Map view — centre coordinates and zoom level, so the map reopens where you left it.
panel.privacy.settings: Settings — language, units, and colour theme preferences.
panel.privacy.thirdPartyBody: When you view the map, your browser fetches map tiles directly from OpenFreeMap. As with any network request, your IP address is visible to their servers. No other data is sent.
panel.privacy.locationBody: If you use the Locate feature, your device's GPS coordinates are used only to show your position on the map. Location data is never transmitted to any server.
panel.privacy.noTrackingBody: This app contains no analytics, no advertising, no cookies, and no tracking scripts of any kind.
panel.settings.title: Settings
panel.view.title: Map view
panel.view.shareDescription: Share a link to this map view.
modal.locate.permissionBody: To display your current location and compass heading, this app needs your permission. When prompted, please allow location and compass access.
modal.locate.deniedIntro: Unable to acquire your location, possibly due to a previous denial of permission. To re-enable it, try:
modal.locate.tryOne: Reloading this page and trying again.
modal.locate.tryTwo: Searching the web for: "allow geolocation after denial <your-browser> <your-device>."
modal.locate.tryThree: Wait some time, then try again later.
